_comment_1: Template — copy to ~/.mcp.json and restart Claude Code.
_comment_2: JSON does not support comments natively; underscored keys are convention-only.
_comment_3: Each server is fetched on demand by Claude Code via npx. Add your own as needed.
_comment_4: These are the user-scope MCPs. The personal/settings.template.json (settings.local.json) must list them in `enabledMcpjsonServers` to activate.
